\tzpentry{ID5277}{Induced Vector Potential Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5277 introduces Induced Vector Potential Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(A_{\text{induced}} = -(1/4\pi c^2) \int_V (\partial J/\partial t) \times (r - r')/|r - r'| \; d^3r'\)
\]
